name: NAMD On Slurm
summary: Run NAMD molecular dynamics jobs on Slurm with CPU/GPU and restart planning.
description: This skill provides a conservative Slurm pattern for NAMD simulations, including site-approved launcher selection, CPU/GPU layout notes, configuration and output review, restart controls, and a plan-only default before running production molecular dynamics.

tools.name: namd2
tools.notes: Common NAMD executable name; some sites use namd3, namd2-mpi, charmrun wrappers, or container entrypoints.

tools.name: charmrun
tools.notes: Some multi-node NAMD builds use charmrun; follow site module or container guidance.

inputs.name: namd_config
inputs.description: NAMD configuration file such as a small smoke-test .conf or reviewed production input.

inputs.name: namd_executable
inputs.description: NAMD executable or wrapper command available in the job environment.

inputs.name: cpu_gpu_layout
inputs.description: Site-reviewed CPU, GPU, +p, +ppn, +devices, or launcher settings.

inputs.name: output_dir
inputs.description: Durable output directory for logs, restart files, and run records.

outputs.name: namd_launch_plan
outputs.description: Reviewable Slurm, launcher, CPU/GPU layout, configuration, output, and restart plan.

outputs.name: namd_log
outputs.description: NAMD output log captured with a deterministic path.

outputs.name: restart_files
outputs.description: Optional restart coordinate, velocity, and extended-system files from the NAMD configuration.

examples.title: Plan or run a NAMD smoke test on Slurm

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Run plan-only mode first, then set RUN_NAMD=1 on a short debug partition with a site-approved NAMD module, container, or launcher wrapper.
